violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is to properly clean and sanitize slicer before using. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
Various food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The outside oil bin was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse areas must be maintained. Per PIC, new oil bin is on order. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The floor tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener, and mixer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was moved to 3-bay sink and mixer was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Chicken, deli meat, and soup was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
Various food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of sauce. Utensils used to dispense TCS and non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

-The 2 door reach-in was observed non-operational and in poor repair. -The bottom of the sanitizing bay at the 3-bay sink was observed with a slow leak Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -Walk-in cooler shelves -Ice machine -Prep unit gaskets -Walk-in freezer fan guard Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The walk-in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to remove ice/ run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The outside oil bin was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse areas must be maintained. Per PIC, company has been contacted for a new oil bin. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The floors and walls throughout the upstairs storage area, bar, and kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Various ceiling tiles in the storefront area, and parts of the kitchen floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC to register with RIDOH CFP. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
Inspector observed dough being stored on sheet pans covered with garbage bags. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fryer shelving have an accumulation of grease and soil residue. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The grease recycling bin has an accumulation of grease and debris. PIC informed that the bin should be cleaned or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The coving in the slicing area is in poor repair, observed incomplete seal with exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC will renew within the week. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixer, can opener, slicer, ingredient bins, dough roller) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
At time of inspection, mushrooms were observed with date mark of 12/12 which exceeds the 7 days. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Sauce, pasta and deli meats were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At time of inspection, pasta was cooling in the refrigerator in a COVERED container greater than four inches deep. PIC moved to shallow container at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of sauce. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the prep area. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Handwash sink 2. Fryers 3. Ovens 4. Flat top grill 5. Grill 6. Paper cutter 7. Shelving throughout kitchen PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The floor tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Employees' coats were observed stored on food storage shelving. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
The floor tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Raw animal foods (such as raw shrimp) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as mayonnaise and cucumbers) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Newburg Sauce was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was out of temperature for an unknown amount of time. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Various prepared foods in the walk-in cooler were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Deceased bird was observed in second floor of storage area. PIC informed to remove. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in refrigerator. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Single service items observed stored on the floor in second floor storage room. Single service items must be stored 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Various food containers (lids and pans) were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door refrigerator gaskets and prep unit and fanguards in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Refuse area, deck area, and exterior of keg room was observed with litter, trash and foilage. Areas to be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
The floor tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The coving by prep station was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
One window on second floor and one window on first floor were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris:1. 2nd floor storage floors2. Entrance to storage room and underneath loading belt3. Floors underneath cookline4. Floors in keg roomThe physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
